title: Rochea biconvexa
taxonomy: Rochea biconvexa is classified as a species of orchid, specifically within the genus Rochea, which is a group of flowering plants native to Australia and New Zealand. It is a member of the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This classification places Rochea biconvexa within the larger group of flowering plants known as angiosperms. As a member of the Orchidaceae family, Rochea biconvexa is closely related to other species of orchids, which are known for their unique and diverse characteristics. Further classification of Rochea biconvexa can be done by examining its morphological and molecular characteristics.
